zh.lifeSummary: 當Priscilla Bennett於1631年10月5日出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特維姆斯時，她的父親Edward Bennett38歲，母親Elizabeth Alice Eginton27歲。她於1651年10月5日與Dea. William Carpenter在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托雷沃斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1663年10月20日在美國麻薩諸塞州布里斯托雷沃斯享年32歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德普洛維登斯普洛維登斯紐曼 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Priscilla Bennett于1631年10月5日出生在英国英格兰多瑟特維姆斯时，她的父亲Edward Bennett38岁，母亲Elizabeth Alice Eginton27岁。她于1651年10月5日与Dea. William Carpenter在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托雷沃斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1663年10月20日在美国马萨诸塞州布里斯托雷沃斯享年32岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德普洛維登斯普洛維登斯紐曼 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Bennett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the medieval personal name Benedict , from Latin Benedictus ‘blessed’. In the 12th century the Latin form of the name is found in England alongside versions derived from the Old French form Beneit, Benoit, which was common among the Normans. The surname has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Bernhard  .
Altered form of French Benet or Bennet or of some other similar (like-sounding) French surname. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

variants.name: Bennetts
meanings: English (Cornwall): variant of Bennett , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Dittus
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Fritz, Kurt, Otto, Reinhold.
German: from a vernacular short form of the Latin personal name Benedictus (see Bennett ).

variants.name: Benedict
meanings: English, German, and Dutch: from the personal name Benedict, from Latin Benedictus ‘blessed’. This owed its popularity in the Middle Ages chiefly to Saint Benedict of Norcia (c. 480–550), who founded the Benedictine order of monks at Monte Cassino and wrote a monastic rule that formed a model for all subsequent rules. No doubt the meaning of the Latin word also contributed to its popularity as a personal name, especially in Romance countries. Occasionally the English surname may derive from Latin benedicite ‘bless (you)’, perhaps given as a nickname to an habitual user of the expression. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed the German variant Benedikt and many cognates from other languages, e.g. Hungarian Benedek , Slovenian Benedik (see Benedick ), and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Italian Benedetti .

variants.name: Bennight
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Bennett  .

variants.name: Bennison
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Bene(i)t + -son. See Bennett and compare Benson .

nameMeanings.name: Priscilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of New Testament origin: from a post-classical Latin personal name, a feminine diminutive of the Roman family name Priscus ‘ancient’. Priscilla was the name of a woman with whom St Paul stayed at Corinth (Acts 18:3), referred to elsewhere as Prisca. The name was in regular use in the late 16th century and enjoyed a modest vogue in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Providence Founded
historicEvents.description: In 1636 Providence is founded as a settlement for Rhode Island by Roger Williams

historicEvents.title: First Baptist Church
historicEvents.description: Roger Williams establishes the First Baptist Church of Rhode Island in Providence during 1638.
Parent History: 1643 – 1685 New Plymouth Colony, Massachusetts Colony 1685 – 1776 Bristol County, Massachusetts Colony 1776 – Today: Bristol County, Massachusetts

en.lifeSummary: When Priscilla Bennett was born on 5 October 1631, in Weymouth, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Edward Bennett, was 38 and her mother, Elizabeth Alice Eginton, was 27. She married Dea. William Carpenter on 5 October 1651, in Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 20 October 1663, in Rehoboth, Bristol, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 32, and was buried in Newman Cemetery, Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Priscilla Bennett est née le 5 octobre 1631, à Weymouth, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edward Bennett, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Alice Eginton, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Dea. William Carpenter le 5 octobre 1651, à Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 20 octobre 1663, à Rehoboth, Bristol, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterrée à Newman Cemetery, Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Priscilla Bennett am 5. Oktober 1631 in Weymouth, Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward Bennett 38 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Alice Eginton 27. Sie hat am 5. Oktober 1651 in Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America Dea. William Carpenter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 20. Oktober 1663 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Rehoboth, Bristol, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Newman Cemetery, Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Priscilla Bennett è nata il il 5 ottobre 1631 nel Weymouth, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Edward Bennett, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Alice Eginton, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Dea. William Carpenter il 5 ottobre 1651, nel Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 ottobre 1663, nel Rehoboth, Bristol, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolta a Newman Cemetery, Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Priscilla Bennettが1631年10月5日にイギリスイギリスドールセトウエイモウスで生まれた時，父Edward Bennettは38歳，母Elizabeth Alice Egintonは27歳であった。1651年10月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーブリストルレhオボスでDea. William Carpenterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1663年10月20日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ブリストルレhオボスで32歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドプロヴィデンスプロヴィデンスニューマン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨
ko.Warren, Bristol, Rhode Island, British C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 브리스톨 워르
ko.Newman Cemetery, East Providence, Provid: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 플로비데스 플로비데스 뉴먼 세멧리
ko.Rehoboth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 레홉스
ko.Rehoboth, Plymouth Colony, British Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 레홉스
ko.lifeSummary: Priscilla Bennett(이)가 1631년 10월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 베이모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Bennett(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Alice Eginton(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1651년 10월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 레홉스에서 Dea. William Carpenter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1663년 10월 20일 미국 매사추세츠 주 브리스톨 레홉스에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 플로비데스 플로비데스 뉴먼 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Priscilla Bennett nasceu em 5 de outubro de 1631, em Weymouth, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edward Bennett, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Alice Eginton, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Dea. William Carpenter em 5 de outubro de 1651, em Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 20 de outubro de 1663, em Rehoboth, Bristol, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 32 anos, e foi sepultada em Newman Cemetery, Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Priscilla Bennett родилась 5 октября 1631 г. в местности вимоут, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edward Bennett было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Alice Eginton, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Dea. William Carpenter 5 октября 1651 г. в местности рэобот, бристол, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 20 октября 1663 г. в местности рэобот, бристол, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 32 лет и была похоронена в местности нюман кеметири, провиденс, провиденс, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Priscilla Bennett nació el 5 de octubre de 1631, en Weymouth, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Edward Bennett, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Alice Eginton, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Dea. William Carpenter el 5 de octubre de 1651, en Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de octubre de 1663, en Rehoboth, Bristol, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultada en Newman Cemetery, Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.
